name: should handle player_target_share_from_plays with a where clause
description: Test case for should handle player_target_share_from_plays with a where clause
expected_query: with "tcb7c8e00e4d3f2856c85f708282c61ff" as materialized (select COALESCE(trg_pid) as pid, SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as trg_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."dwn" in (3) group by COALESCE(trg_pid) having SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= '15'), "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years), "tf5b7795e7b14f28206eb086009732161" as materialized (select "pg"."pid", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 2) as trg_share_from_plays from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."tm" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("trg_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."dwn" in (3) and "pg"."year" in (2023) group by "pg"."pid"), "ta762c0f59b3a05014c3a37bcd98b385b" as materialized (select "pg"."pid", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 2) as trg_share_from_plays from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."tm" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("trg_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."qtr" in (1, 2) and "pg"."year" in (2023) group by "pg"."pid") select "player"."pid", "tcb7c8e00e4d3f2856c85f708282c61ff"."trg_from_plays" AS "trg_from_plays_0", player.first_name, player.last_name, "tf5b7795e7b14f28206eb086009732161"."trg_share_from_plays" AS "trg_share_from_plays_0", "ta762c0f59b3a05014c3a37bcd98b385b"."trg_share_from_plays" AS "trg_share_from_plays_1", "player"."primary_position" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" inner join "tcb7c8e00e4d3f2856c85f708282c61ff" on "tcb7c8e00e4d3f2856c85f708282c61ff"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "tf5b7795e7b14f28206eb086009732161" on "tf5b7795e7b14f28206eb086009732161"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "ta762c0f59b3a05014c3a37bcd98b385b" on "ta762c0f59b3a05014c3a37bcd98b385b"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by "tcb7c8e00e4d3f2856c85f708282c61ff"."trg_from_plays", player.first_name, player.last_name, "tf5b7795e7b14f28206eb086009732161"."trg_share_from_plays", "ta762c0f59b3a05014c3a37bcd98b385b"."trg_share_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 5 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
